records.question: Which tourist attractions named jungle cruise have a photo with filename 863 and are located in Shark World?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN photos ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE photos.filename = '863' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'jungle cruise' AND locations.location_name = 'Shark World'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions ta
JOIN Photos p ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = p.Tourist_Attraction_ID
JOIN Locations l ON ta.Location_ID = l.Location_ID
WHERE ta.Name = 'jungle cruise'
AND p.Filename = '863'
AND l.Location_Name = 'Shark World'

records.question: Which tourist attractions named parking can be reached by shuttle and have had visits on or after 2007-09-03 04:30:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN visits ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = visits.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE visits.visit_date >= '2007-09-03 04:30:01' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'shuttle' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'parking'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1
JOIN Visits AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID = T2.Tourist_Attraction_ID
WHERE T1.Name LIKE '%parking%'
AND T1.How_to_Get_There LIKE '%shuttle%'
AND T2.Visit_Date >= '2007-09-03 04:30:01'

records.question: Which tourist attractions are located exactly at 2485 Mueller Squares Suite 537?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN staff ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = staff.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE locations.address = '2485 Mueller Squares Suite 537'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1
JOIN Locations AS T2 ON T1.Location_ID = T2.Location_ID
WHERE T2.Address = '2485 Mueller Squares Suite 537'

records.question: Which tourist attractions named presidents hall are museums where you can get there by walking?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
WHERE ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'museum' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'presidents hall' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions AS T1
INNER JOIN Museums AS T2 ON T1.Tourist_Attraction_ID = T2.Museum_ID
WHERE T1.Name = 'presidents hall' AND T1.How_to_Get_There = 'walk'

records.question: Which tourist attractions that have related attraction types, locations, street markets with market details equal to 'Broadway', and visits are these?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN street_markets ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = street_markets.market_id
JOIN visits ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = visits.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE street_markets.market_details = 'Broadway'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions ta
JOIN Ref_Attraction_Types rat ON ta.Attraction_Type_Code = rat.Attraction_Type_Code
JOIN Locations l ON ta.Location_ID = l.Location_ID
JOIN Street_Markets sm ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = sm.Market_ID
JOIN Visits v ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = v.Tourist_Attraction_ID
WHERE sm.Market_Details = 'Broadway'

records.question: Which tourist attractions can be reached exactly by shuttle?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
WHERE tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'shuttle'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions
WHERE How_to_Get_There = 'shuttle'

records.question: Which tourist attractions named history gallery can you walk to at The Boneyard located at 0692 Georgiana Pass that have photos where the filename is 864 and the name is din3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN photos ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = photos.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE photos.filename = '864' AND photos.name = 'din3' AND locations.location_name = 'The Boneyard' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'history gallery' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk' AND locations.address = '0692 Georgiana Pass'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions ta
JOIN Locations l ON ta.Location_ID = l.Location_ID
JOIN Photos p ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = p.Tourist_Attraction_ID
WHERE ta.Name = 'history gallery'
AND ta.How_to_Get_There = 'walk'
AND l.Location_Name = 'The Boneyard'
AND l.Address = '0692 Georgiana Pass'
AND p.Filename = '864'
AND p.Name = 'din3'

records.question: Which tourist attractions named exploration trial are galleries accessible by walking, located at Soak Station with the address 4908 Reinger Vista and associated with the Broadway street market?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN locations ON tourist_attractions.location_id = locations.location_id
JOIN street_markets ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = street_markets.market_id
WHERE locations.address = '4908 Reinger Vista' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'exploration trial' AND ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'gallery' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk' AND locations.location_name = 'Soak Station' AND street_markets.market_details = 'Broadway'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID
FROM Tourist_Attractions ta
JOIN Locations l ON ta.Location_ID = l.Location_ID
JOIN Ref_Attraction_Types rat ON ta.Attraction_Type_Code = rat.Attraction_Type_Code
JOIN Street_Markets sm ON ta.Tourist_Attraction_ID = sm.Market_ID
WHERE ta.Name = 'exploration trial'
AND rat.Attraction_Type_Description = 'gallery'
AND ta.How_to_Get_There = 'walk'
AND l.Location_Name = 'Soak Station'
AND l.Address = '4908 Reinger Vista'
AND sm.Market_Details = 'Broadway'
